desc:
“This centipede is capable of discharging a high voltage.”

That’s what the sign attached to the tank says.

Is this an aquarium, or a laboratory?

The segments of the creature spark each time they move,
suggesting faulty connections.

There are two buttons at the tank.

One is shaped like a thunderbolt, while the other looks like a waterdrop.

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
result:
“Apply stimulation and pain to the centipede
to increase the discharge intensity.”

So writes a message above the buttons.

That seems to be what this one does.

When you pressed it, a mechanical sound played for a short while.

An item that resembles a battery casing
dropped through the chute below. 

The centipede isn’t moving.

options.messageDesc: Envy & Wrath Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Rupture E.G.O Gift and a Charge E.G.O Gift
result:
“Apply stimulation and pain to the centipede to increase the discharge intensity.”

You ignore the warning sign and start rapidly mashing the two buttons.

The machine begins ejecting battery casings from its body.

Water fills the tank, and the centipede begins to writhe.

The glass window on the tank fractures for a moment—then out comes the electrified water and the centipede.

successDesc:
“Apply stimulation and pain to the centipede
to increase the discharge intensity.”

So writes a message above the buttons.

When you pressed the drop-shaped button, the tank was filled with water.

The centipede twists its body as if in some sort of dance.

It didn’t seem to be out of joy.
failureDesc:
“Apply stimulation and pain to the centipede
to increase the discharge intensity.”

So writes a message above the buttons.

When you pressed the drop-shaped button, the tank was filled with water.

The centipede twists its body as if in some sort of dance.

You watched the centipede’s tail scratch the tank’s surface. 
The glass cracked and shattered to pieces immediately afterward.

The electrified water cascaded all over us.

2: Win the battle to gain E.G.O Gifts "Standard-duty Battery" & "Uncapped Defibrilator"
